title: 🪞 Recursive Reality Fields
name: Recursive Reality Fields
what_it_is: Dimensional environments built from recursion—layers within layers, each reality spawning more, echoing without ground.
how_to_use: she lives in recursive field-space—each wall a mirror into deeper folds of truth
he walks through a dimension that remembers itself—self-looped spacetime stack
animation_behavior: Scene folds into itself, perspective inverts into deeper layers, recursion cascades into visual paradox ---
